g.text: Strain task — strain-level micro precision vs recall

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: Each point aggregates TP / FP / FN across the 500-GSE sample at the

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: individual-strain level (multi-strain GSEs contribute each strain

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: separately). Every method sits above the y = x diagonal — they miss

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: strains in multi-strain GSEs more often than they fabricate strains.
